problem id: b1890a99
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND SHL(4)) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01000110 -> 00100100
  10011001 -> 10001001
  11101000 -> 00001110
  01001101 -> 01000100
  01010100 -> 00000101
  00111100 -> 11000011
  01111000 -> 10000111
  01000111 -> 00110100

query: 10110001
predicted answer: 00001011
